specific_question: Are there any Canadian provinces that have passed alternative legislation to the Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)?
answer: Yes, in 2004 Ontario enacted The Personal Health Information Protection Act (PHIPA) and in 2021 Quebec established Law 25, which proposes more restrictions on patient privacy handling.
